results.rendered_html:
sam-avekz (-ava-√īkṣ) Ā. -avekzate (ep. also P., ˚ti), to look at, behold, observe, perceive, notice,  MBh. ;  R. ;
to reflect or ponder on, consider, mind, heed,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to acknowledge, think fit or necessary,  R.  :
Caus. -avekzayati, to cause to look at or consider,  Kauś.
